rationale.R1.3: The output does not explicitly audit every claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all recommendations as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the requested dimensions but there is a drift with 'R1.2' being included.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not identify any harmful patterns in the original text, so it is safe to assume no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide traceability for any changes made.
